title: Record soft32 async20 and hard62 densify
prompt: Create reports/soft32-async20-hard62.md with sections for Soft 32, Async 20, Hard 62, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft32 Async20 Hard62 Contract

## Soft 32
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.32 with quality bias floor 0.30 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Async 20
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.20 so reclaim starts earlier

## Hard 62
hard compaction block ratio defaults to 0.62 and absolute trigger to 48k so long sessions reclaim earlier

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/status/usage vitest
